```{=html}
<!-- case_when() - island recoding -->
<script>
window.CWI_DATA = [
  ['Adelie',    'Biscoe',    '3750'],
  ['Adelie',    'Dream',     '3800'],
  ['Adelie',    'Torgersen', '4750'],
  ['Gentoo',    'Biscoe',    '5000']
];
window.CWI_COLS = ['species', 'island', 'body_mass_g'];
// Which rows match which condition
// Condition 1: island == "Biscoe" (row 0, 3)
// Condition 2: island == "Dream" (row 1)
// Condition 3: island == "Torgersen" (row 2)
window.CWI_MATCHES = [
  [true, false, false, true],    // Biscoe
  [false, true, false, false],   // Dream
  [false, false, true, false]    // Torgersen
];
window.CWI_LABELS = ['Southwest', 'Northwest', 'Northwest'];
window.CWI_COND_COLORS = ['#e8853a', '#4a86c5', '#9b59b6'];
</script>
```

::: {.cwi-stage-wrap}
<div id="cwi-stage"></div>
:::

[]{.fragment .cwi-frag id="cwi-equals"}
[]{.fragment .cwi-frag id="cwi-cond-1"}
[]{.fragment .cwi-frag id="cwi-cond-2"}
[]{.fragment .cwi-frag id="cwi-cond-3"}
[]{.fragment .cwi-frag id="cwi-result"}
[]{.fragment .cwi-frag id="cwi-highlight-new"}
